title: Arbiter of Steel
description: The Arbiter waits in the forest clearing. Light armor, dueling leathers, one-on-one challenge. From the World 1 novella ch6.

lines: The Arbiter of Steel waited in a clearing where the corruption was thickest.
She stood at the clearing's center — geometrically precise. Light armor, dueling leathers, holding her sword point-down in the manner of someone who doesn't need to threaten you.

lines.speaker: Arbiter
lines.text: I challenge one of you. Whoever leads. The others stay back. I'll know if they don't.

lines.speaker: Arbiter
lines.text: Then you fight together, and you have already compromised your honor before the first blow lands.

lines.speaker: Arbiter
lines.text: Come at me with everything. I'll know if you're holding back. And I'll be disappointed.
